notes: langgraph-typescript shares the LangGraph canonical docs tree (same as langgraph-python).

All og_docs_url values in feature-registry.json currently point at https://docs.copilotkit.ai/features/<id> which render the Next.js 404 shell (~673KB page). These are effectively broken links and are reported as og:red-X below.

All shell_docs_url values point at /docs/features/<id> which are not wired into the showcase shell (shell routes docs under /<framework>/<mdx-slug> or /docs/<mdx-slug>). These are reported as shell:red-X.
The 'canonical_langgraph_doc' field on each feature records the closest real MDX page in the content tree — useful when remediating og_docs_url / shell_docs_url for this column.

features.og_reason: Resolves to Next.js 404 shell (~673KB, no content). Real page lives at /agentic-chat-ui (root) or /integrations/langgraph/agentic-chat-ui.
Resolves to Next.js 404 shell. Real canonical page: /integrations/langgraph/generative-ui/your-components/interactive.
Resolves to Next.js 404 shell. Real canonical page: /integrations/langgraph/generative-ui/tool-rendering.
Resolves to Next.js 404 shell. Real canonical page: /integrations/langgraph/generative-ui/your-components/display-only.
Resolves to Next.js 404 shell. Real canonical page: /integrations/langgraph/generative-ui/state-rendering.
Feature has no og_docs_url in feature-registry.json.
features.shell_reason: Feature has no shell_docs_url in feature-registry.json.

features.og_reason: Resolves to Next.js 404 shell. Real canonical page: /integrations/langgraph/shared-state/predictive-state-updates.
Resolves to Next.js 404 shell. Real canonical page: /integrations/langgraph/multi-agent-flows (and /integrations/langgraph/subgraphs).

missing.summary: 8/8 features have broken og_docs_url (all point to /features/<id> which is a stub 404 on docs.copilotkit.ai). 8/8 features have broken shell_docs_url (all point to /docs/features/<id> which is not routed in the showcase shell). 1/8 (shared-state-read-write) has no docs URLs defined at all in feature-registry.json.
